text:
Kukan'yu Kingdom (, Kukan'yu Ōkoku) is a country located above the Yorbian Continent on a yet unnamed continent and is one of the countries of the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

Background

It was originally part of the V5 before the Kakin Empire joined them and they became the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 342 

In the past, Beyond Netero accompanied a team formed by the Kukan'yu Kingdom's to explore the Dark Continent and succeeded in bringing back the alchemy plant Metallion. However, by going off-route, they caught Zobae Disease. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 The plant died, and only six returned, including Beyond and the Hunter afflicted by the disease, who has been self-sustaining for almost 50 years. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 341 

Locations

Notable places in this country are:
Dolle Harbor
Zaban City
Milsy Wetlands
Visca Forest Preserve
Split Mountain
Raoul Mountain
Trick Tower
Zevil Island
Beeskafmarro
Diksakura
